nodes.title: Welcome to ACT
nodes.summary: An introduction to publishing your WordPress content as an Agent Content Tree.

content.text: If you're reading this, you found a WordPress blog that publishes its content twice: once as the HTML you're looking at, and once as ACT (Agent Content Tree) — a structured JSON tree that AI agents can walk without scraping HTML.
The same posts, pages, and taxonomies you author in WordPress flow through the @act-spec/adapter-wordpress package and land at /.well-known/act.json + /act/ on the same origin.
The rest of these posts walk through the moving parts.
